member.name: M:AIAugmentedPitchAnalyzer.Api.Controllers.PitchAnalysisController.GetParsedPitchAnalysis(System.Guid)
member.summary: Retrieves the parsed AI analysis for a pitch, including summary, score, and recommendations.

member.name: T:AIAugmentedPitchAnalyzer.Api.Middleware.ExceptionHandlingMiddleware
member.summary: Middleware to catch unhandled exceptions globally and return standard ApiResponse schema.
